title: Module 5.3: Canadian Regulations (REDA)
subtitle: Master the Radiation Emitting Devices Act & Transport Canada Requirements
description: Navigate Canada's Radiation Emitting Devices Act (REDA), understand Health Canada's role, and learn Transport Canada's requirements for outdoor laser operations. Features interactive REDA compliance flow and indoor/outdoor decision tree.
learning_objectives: Understand the structure and provisions of REDA
Identify Health Canada vs Transport Canada jurisdictions
Navigate indoor vs outdoor show requirements
Complete the Notice of Proposal process for outdoor shows
Understand inspector powers and manufacturer obligations
Apply the 2.5 mW/cm² MPE limit for indoor shows

badge.name: Canada Compliance Expert
badge.description: Mastered Canadian laser regulations under REDA

standards_reference: Radiation Emitting Devices Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. R-1)

research_alignment.adult_learning: Regulatory pathway learning with decision trees
